_comment: OpenMed pinned-checkpoint set for NER_MODE=models (ADR-012). Copy this file
to the weights volume as /models/models.json on the DGX Spark, then set each
'revision' to the exact commit SHA resolved at download time. The backend
refuses to start while any 'revision' is null, so an unpinned checkpoint can
never silently change extraction behaviour. Repository ids follow OpenMed's
naming; confirm the exact id against the OpenMed org on Hugging Face when you
download, since a repo-id correction is a config edit here, not a code change.
All OpenMed checkpoints and their base models are Apache-2.0 / MIT. The
weights and this filled-in file stay on the box and are NOT committed.
